login_node_constraint: ulimit -t 300 (CPU seconds). PyTorch loading + torch ops exhaust the 300s CPU time budget. Only pure-Python Zeyrek benchmarks completed.

C1_zeyrek.measurement_notes: Cold-cache = each of 957 unique val sentences analyzed exactly once. Warm-cache = 200 unique sentences repeated, inflated by Zeyrek internal caching.
C1_zeyrek.verdict_throughput: REFUTED — cold-cache 1,959 tok/s is 0.31x of claimed 6,380 tok/s (3.3x slower). Ratio outside ±50% band.
C1_zeyrek.verdict_memory: REFUTED — MorphoAnalyzer+Zeyrek uses 237 MB load delta vs claimed ~50 MB. Note: measurement includes Python process overhead, not just Zeyrek data structures.
C1_zeyrek.caveat: Login node vs TRUBA compute node may differ; claimed measurement context not documented.

C2_berturk_cached.verdict: UNVERIFIABLE — CPU time limit (SIGXCPU) kills process during BERTurk weight loading.

partial_evidence.note: 1.5 GB claim likely includes activation tensors + BERT cache (7144×768×4 = 22 MB) + overhead. Model weights alone ~440 MB. 1.5 GB implausible for inference-only; may include training optimizer state.

C3_reranker.verdict: PARTIALLY CONFIRMED for memory (9.3 MB matches claimed ~10 MB). Throughput UNVERIFIABLE — PyTorch startup exhausts CPU time before measurement window.
C3_reranker.partial_evidence: Reranker checkpoint loads as 9.3 MB (1,043,905 params × ~4 bytes = ~4 MB theoretical; 9.3 MB measured includes Python object overhead).

C4_dual_head.verdict: UNVERIFIABLE — No DualHead checkpoint exists (see Phase 8).
